message.content:
Forge is treating this as a [api] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

Forge is treating this as a [react] based on your prompt. Generating plan...

<think>
The user wants a full-stack restaurant management application using Next.js 14, TypeScript, NextAuth, Prisma, and Tailwind CSS.
I need to create 24 specific files.

Plan:
1.  Create configuration files: `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`, `.env.example`.
2.  Create Prisma schema: `prisma/schema.prisma`.
3.  Create library files: `src/lib/prisma.ts`, `src/lib/auth.ts`.
4.  Create global styles and layout: `src/app/globals.css`, `src/app/layout.tsx`.
5.  Create authentication and middleware: `src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts`, `src/middleware.ts`.
6.  Create API routes: `src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts`, `src/app/api/menu/route.ts`, `src/app/api/orders/route.ts`.
7.  Create components: `src/components/Navbar.tsx`, `src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx`, `src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx`, `src/components/OrderTable.tsx`.
8.  Create pages: `src/app/page.tsx`, `src/app/dashboard/page.tsx`, `src/app/menu/page.tsx`, `src/app/orders/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/login/page.tsx`, `src/app/auth/register/page.tsx`.

I will use `str_replace_editor(command="create", ...)` for all files.
I will batch the creation as much as possible in my thought process but I have to call the tool for each file.
I will use `note` to track progress.
</think>

function.name: str_replace_editor
function.arguments:
{"command": "create", "file_text": "{
  "name": "restaurant-management-app",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "postinstall": "prisma generate"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@prisma/client": "^5.10.2",
    "bcryptjs": "^2.4.3",
    "next": "14.1.0",
    "next-auth": "^4.24.6",
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0",
    "zod": "^3.22.4"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/bcryptjs": "^2.4.6",
    "@types/node": "^20.11.20",
    "@types/react": "^18.2.58",
    "@types/react-dom": "^18.2.19",
    "autoprefixer": "^10.4.17",
    "postcss": "^8.4.35",
    "prisma": "^5.10.2",
    "tailwindcss": "^3.4.1",
    "typescript": "^5.3.3"
  }
}
", "path": "/workspace/package.json"}
